response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates strong general software engineering skills and experience, the role has multiple critical requirements that are not met. Most significantly, native-level Japanese fluency is explicitly required and completely absent from the resume. Additionally, the candidate's career has been primarily in web/cloud development with high-level languages, lacking the embedded systems, network security, and firmware specialization essential for this role. Their C/C++ experience dates back to 2014-2015, and there is no evidence of security domain expertise (encryption, authentication protocols, MACsec, 802.1X) or Linux kernel-level work required for the position.
strengths: 15+ years of professional software development with strong engineering practices (TDD, software craftsmanship)
Demonstrated experience with low-level systems: C/C++ at National Instruments, Linux infrastructure setup, and some embedded work (robotic arms, iOS/Apple TV development)
Proven ability to learn diverse technology stacks and rapidly acquire expertise across different domains
concerns: No native-level Japanese language proficiency (critical hard requirement for the role)
Career trajectory shows no focus on embedded systems, network security, or firmware development; background is primarily web/cloud applications
Lacks domain expertise in required security technologies (encryption, key exchange, authentication systems, MACsec, 802.1X) and networking protocols (Layer-2/3, SNMP, NETCONF, switch operation)

key_factors.factor: No embedded security or networking domain expertise
Strong general software engineering and learning ability
